title: WA7 4JE, Vynova Runcorn Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/GP3536AC/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Vynova Runcorn Limited Installation name: Runcorn Manufacturing Site Permit number: EPR/GP3536AC  "
